remarks: This home is set on 2 level acres in a 4 acres zone with incredible light and potential. The private location is conveniently located to Greenwich's Griff Public Golf Course, Augustine's Farm, Merritt Parkway, 684, Glenville, and Armonk. Create a custom estate with your builder/architect on this special tranquil property. House sold as is.
